ideation: This sequence will animate a regal lion's mane and posture.  The animation will focus on a slow, deliberate head shake, implying a majestic presence. The arms will remain relatively still, only moving slightly to emphasize the head movement and maintain balance. Frame 1 will have the arms at rest, slightly angled outward to maintain balance. Frame 2 will subtly lift the arms, creating a slight upward arc to enhance the head shake. Frame 3 will return the arms to their original position, while the head completes its shake. Frame 4 will have the arms return to a neutral position, completing the cycle.

frames.beat: arms rest at the sides, a regal stillness
arms lift slightly, a subtle majestic sway
arms return to sides as the head shakes
both arms settle, the lion surveys its domain
